hero.subtitle: EXPLORE THE GEOMETRY OF
hero.title: The Circle
hero.description: Discover circle theorems through interactive animations, challenging games, and engaging quizzes.

theorems.title: Circle Theorems
theorems.subtitle: Swipe or click to explore each theorem

theorem1.name: Angle at Centre
theorem1.desc: The angle at the centre is twice the angle at the circumference when subtended by the same arc.

theorem2.name: Angles in Same Segment
theorem2.desc: Angles subtended by the same arc in the same segment are equal.

theorem3.name: Angle in Semicircle
theorem3.desc: The angle inscribed in a semicircle is always a right angle (90°).

theorem4.name: Cyclic Quadrilateral
theorem4.desc: Opposite angles in a cyclic quadrilateral sum to 180°.

theorem5.name: Tangent-Radius
theorem5.desc: A tangent to a circle is perpendicular to the radius at the point of contact.

theorem6.name: Equal Tangent Lengths
theorem6.desc: Two tangent lines drawn from the same external point are equal in length.

game.title: Interactive Games
game.desc: Learn circle concepts through engaging, hands-on games with visual feedback and challenges.

quiz.title: Test Your Knowledge
quiz.desc: Take level-based quizzes with instant feedback. Progress from basics to advanced theorems.

learn.title: Visual Learning
learn.desc: Watch animated demonstrations of every circle theorem. Drag and interact to deepen understanding.

footer.desc: An interactive platform for learning circle geometry, built for GCSE students.
